---
title: "Projects"
page-layout: article
---

```{=html}
<p class="page-subtitle">Tools, research code, and side projects.</p>

<div class="sk-empty-state">
  <div class="empty-icon">🛠️</div>
  <h3>Projects coming soon.</h3>
  <p>Research code and tools will appear here as they are released.</p>
</div>
```
